extract: The Sandgem Flats (Japanese: マサゴ平原 Masago Plains) is an area located in the southwestern region of the Obsidian Fieldlands of Hisui. It connects to Lake Verity and Aspiration Hill to the north. Ramanas Island is visible across the river. Despite what the name might suggest, in modern day Sinnoh, the Sandgem Flats become part of Verity Lakefront, Route 201, and Twinleaf Town. However, Sandgem Town would be established at what appears to be the river to the east of the flats once it has dried up.
